problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
